evals.prompt: Run the drift gate on a package whose imports exactly match the manifest.
Run the drift gate on a package with an undeclared back-edge; it must fail.

assertions.cmd: python -c "import subprocess, sys; sys.exit(0 if subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'scripts/drift_check.py', '--manifest', 'evals/fixtures/drift/architecture.yaml'], capture_output=True).returncode == 1 else 1)"
assertions.text: the gate exits non-zero on drift

evals.prompt: Emit a dependencies: block from the real graph for bootstrapping a manifest.

assertions.cmd: python -c "import subprocess, sys, yaml; out = subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'scripts/drift_check.py', '--manifest', 'evals/fixtures/clean/architecture.yaml', '--emit-actual'], capture_output=True, text=True).stdout; d = yaml.safe_load(out); sys.exit(0 if isinstance(d, dict) and 'dependencies' in d else 1)"
assertions.text: emitted block is valid YAML with a dependencies key

evals.prompt: Freshness check passes when the committed diagram matches the manifest.

assertions.text: fresh diagram passes the freshness gate

evals.prompt: Freshness check fails when the committed diagram is out of date.

assertions.cmd: python -c "import subprocess, sys; sys.exit(0 if subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'scripts/mermaid_gen.py', '--manifest', 'evals/fixtures/stale/architecture.yaml', '--check', '-o', 'evals/fixtures/stale/architecture.mmd'], capture_output=True).returncode == 1 else 1)"
assertions.text: the freshness gate exits non-zero when stale
